overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt of Rivia walking through a medieval harbor district at dusk. The character moves along waterfront docks and cobblestone streets, passing various NPCs and ships moored in the harbor, with a large stone bridge visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow waterfront dock walkway with stone railing and harbor wall

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking steadily along the stone dock walkway, passing pedestrians moving in various directions

notable_agents.action: woman in a green dress walking in the opposite direction, adjusting her hair
man in a brown shirt walking alongside Geralt briefly before moving ahead

entered.detail: tall stone wall running along the water's edge with a wooden railing on top
large brick industrial building with multiple windows facing the dock
tall masts of sailing ships moored in the harbor against the dark sky
simple wooden bench placed along the harbor wall
wooden handcart parked near the dock edge

segments.scene_description: Geralt walks along a narrow stone dock walkway bordered by a tall harbor wall on the right and brick warehouse buildings on the left. The area is moderately crowded with pedestrians, including a woman in a green dress walking past. Tall ship masts are visible in the harbor beyond the wall, and the scene is lit by the dim blue light of dusk.

scene_state.functional_zone: open harbor beach with wooden docks and beached ships

events.description: ground transitions from stone pavement to dirt and grass as the walkway opens into a wide harbor front

agents.ego_description: Geralt continues along the waterfront dirt path, moving past wooden dock structures and beached vessels

notable_agents.action: person in a red coat standing near the water's edge looking out at the ships

entered.detail: unpaved dirt and grass path running along the shoreline
wooden ramps and piers extending toward the water, some partially collapsed
small wooden rowboat pulled up on the sandy shore
massive stone towers of a bridge visible in the distant fog
wooden crates and barrels stacked near the dock structures

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a wide harbor front with a dirt path replacing the stone walkway. Wooden dock structures and beached rowboats line the shore, while large sailing ships are moored in the water. The stone bridge towers become visible in the distant fog. Fewer pedestrians are present, and the atmosphere remains dark and overcast.

scene_state.functional_zone: cobblestone street leading to medieval stone bridge

events.description: path transitions from dirt back to cobblestone as buildings appear on the left side

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking up the cobblestone street toward the stone bridge, following a group of NPCs ahead

notable_agents.action: group of three pedestrians walking ahead toward the bridge archway

entered.detail: wet cobblestone pavement reflecting the dim light, leading uphill
medieval half-timbered houses with dark wooden beams and plaster walls
large stone archway entrance of the bridge becoming more prominent
low stone wall running along the right side of the street
wooden carts and wagons parked along the street side

segments.scene_description: Geralt transitions onto a cobblestone street flanked by timber-framed medieval buildings on the left and a stone retaining wall on the right. The street leads upward toward an imposing stone bridge with large towers. A group of pedestrians walks ahead in the same direction, and wooden carts are parked along the street. The bridge archway grows larger as the character approaches.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a medieval harbor district that transitions from narrow dock walkways into an open waterfront and finally toward a towering stone bridge. It begins with Geralt walking along a stone path bordered by brick warehouses and a harbor wall under the dim blue light of dusk, passing pedestrians and the masts of distant ships. As the walkway opens into a wide harbor front, the stone gives way to a dirt path lined with beached rowboats and moored sailing ships, while the distant bridge towers emerge through a dark, overcast fog. The scene then shifts onto a cobblestone street flanked by timber-framed buildings and parked wooden carts, following a group of pedestrians as the path leads upward. Finally, the camera approaches the imposing stone bridge, with its massive archway growing larger as the character moves toward the structure.
